_comment: Model-profile execution policy EXAMPLE (contract L4-F3). address_space_bytes is deliberately OMITTED: RLIMIT_AS gates the mmap of GGUF weights, so any cap below (weights + runtime overhead) kills the child with ENOMEM before it generates a token. If an operator insists on setting it, the honest floor is size_bytes + max(2 GiB, 30% of size_bytes). Do NOT inherit policy.example.json's 1 GiB / 10 s defaults for inference -- they are lethal for real models. Keys starting with '_' are comments and ignored by SandboxPolicy.from_mapping.
_comment_cpu_seconds: cpu_seconds must be sized as n_threads x expected wall time (llama.cpp burns CPU on every thread): 8 threads x 300 s wall = 2400.
